domain: Tuareg takouba sword-shield combat (Sahel/Sahara region; straight double-edged 74-84cm blade paired with hide shield; fast-footwork over heavy armor due to Saharan heat; mobile cavalry; sword technique iteratively pressured by opposing shield innovations across generations)
specific_mechanism: TAKOUBA-COEVOL-LIGHTGEAR: lightweight rapid-iteration attacker-defender LLM coevolution with budget mobility constraint. (1) Attacker_t (sword-LLM) generates adversarial prompts under compute-budget B_A (lightweight, e.g., 100 prompts/cycle). (2) Defender_t refines refusal-policy under B_D (lightweight, e.g., 100 SFT/DPO steps/cycle). (3) Cycle-frequency-prioritized: 1000 cycles × (100 attacks + 100 defenses) instead of 10 cycles × (10000 attacks + 10000 defenses). (4) Mobility constraint: B_A + B_D ≤ B_total << conventional red-team budget. (5) Red-Queen archive: each defender generation re-tested on full historical attack archive {A_1, ..., A_t-1}; gradient-update prioritized on archive-failures. (6) Defensive innovations: refusal-policy variants ('shield curvature') tracked as discrete defensive states; attacker adapts.
llm_application: TAKOUBA-COEVOL-LIGHTGEAR lightweight rapid-iteration attacker-defender LLM coevolution + budget mobility constraint + Red-Queen historical-archive validation + cycle-frequency-prioritized. Differs from R419 KOMI-WARD (different — Komi adversarial). R424 TLINGIT-POTLATCH (different). R433 (different). R437 BERBER-AMAZIGH (different — tribal warrior, closest, but no lightweight rapid-cycle). R459 KOMODO-DELAYED-INJECT (different — delayed injection). R473 SUMO-TACHI-AI (different — opening-commit defender). Differs from Digital Red Queen Sakana (closest, coevolutionary lineage with each warrior must beat predecessors — same Red-Queen archive, but no lightweight cycle-frequency-prioritized budget constraint). Adversarial Preference Learning ACL2025 (attacker-defender tandem co-training — closest, no budget mobility). Active Attacks 2509.21947 (red-team adaptive — single direction). Auto Red Teaming 2508.04451 (attack planning, not budget-mobility). Differs by LIGHTWEIGHT RAPID-CYCLE FREQUENCY PRIORITIZED + COMPUTE-BUDGET MOBILITY CONSTRAINT + ARCHIVE-FAILURE GRADIENT PRIORITY.
novelty_claim: Digital Red Queen + Adversarial Preference Learning + Active Attacks + Auto Red Teaming cover attacker-defender coevolution paradigm. TAKOUBA-COEVOL-LIGHTGEAR adds (a) lightweight rapid-cycle frequency-prioritized + (b) compute-budget mobility constraint + (c) archive-failure gradient priority. Recombination — borderline lookup.
